venues.name: Atlantide
venues.description: One of two main dining rooms added in Silver Spirit's 2018 hull-stretch refit. Contemporary international cuisine with a steakhouse emphasis — lobster and caviar salad, filet mignon, New Zealand lamb. Art Deco décor with marble columns and chandeliers. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: Indochine
venues.description: Second main dining room from the 2018 refit, unique to Silver Spirit in the classic fleet. Pan-Asian fusion spanning Indian, Chinese, Korean, Thai, and Vietnamese cuisine. Dishes include teriyaki skewers, Chinese beef tenderloin, aloo gobi, and tuna nikkei. Open-seating dinner only. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Fleet-wide Italian signature on Deck 7. Buffet breakfast and lunch with alfresco terrace seating; evening à la carte Italian with handmade pasta, veal ossobuco, and slow-food philosophy. Reservations recommended for dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: Silver Note
venues.description: Jazz supper club originally launched as Stars Supper Club, renamed after the 2018 refit. Art Deco atmosphere with live jazz duo. Menu structured around four unconventional categories rather than traditional courses — approximately 4–5 small plates per person. Complimentary; reservations required.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Poolside casual dining on Deck 9 by day: burgers, salads, grilled fish, and sandwiches. Evening Hot Rocks: guests cook prime steaks, pork chops, prawns, and fish on preheated volcanic lava stones at the table. Heat lamps added in the 2018 refit. Complimentary.

venues.name: Spaccanapoli
venues.description: Neapolitan pizzeria above The Grill, unique to Silver Spirit among the classic fleet. Wood-fired oven with San Marzano tomatoes and fresh ingredients. Adjacent gelato bar. Open 11 am–11 pm daily. Complimentary.

venues.name: Arts Café
venues.description: All-day café serving pastries, paninis, afternoon tea with scones and finger sandwiches, and specialty coffees and teas throughout the day. Complimentary.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: Signature French fine-dining restaurant in partnership with Relais & Châteaux. Five to six-course tasting menu: foie gras, Chilean sea bass, caviar, lobster, Grand Marnier soufflé. Approximately 20 intimate covers; jacket required. Dinner only; supplement $60 per person.

venues.name: Seishin
venues.description: Japanese specialty restaurant unique to Silver Spirit — named for the Japanese word for 'spirit.' Sushi and sashimi bar on sea days (complimentary). Evening omakase-style dining with wagyu beef, spider crab, miso-glazed black cod, and lobster. Dinner supplement approximately $40 per person; reservations required.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining with full butler service. Includes three-course dinner service and breakfast ordering. Dishes available that are not found in the main restaurants.
